title.en: Whatever! Anything is fine! 괜찮아! 상관없어! 아무거나 좋아!

description.en: When you want to follow someone else's opinion on plans or menus! Practice answering coolly with 상관없어 and 아무거나 좋아.
description.ko: 메뉴나 계획을 정할 때 상대방의 의견에 따르고 싶다면! 상관없어와 아무거나 좋아를 사용해 쿨하게 대답해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Indifference. Decision-making. Agreement. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 오늘 점심 메뉴 결정하셨어요? 제가 몇 가지 골라봤는데 들어보실래요?
content.translation: John. have you decided on a lunch menu today? I've picked a few. do you want to hear them?

content.speaker: John
content.text: I'm feeling lazy today. so anything is fine with me. 아무거나 좋아.
content.translation: I'm feeling lazy today. so anything is fine with me. Anything is fine.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 정말요? 그럼 우리 오늘 아주 매운 짬뽕 먹으러 갈까요?
content.translation: Really? Then shall we go eat very spicy Jjamppong today?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh. I'm not good with spicy food. but if you really want it. 괜찮아.
content.translation: Oh. I'm not good with spicy food. but if you really want it. it's okay.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 농담이에요. 존이 매운 거 못 먹는 거 다 알죠. 그냥 상관없어 라고 하길래 장난 좀 쳐봤어요!
content.translation: Just kidding. I know you can't eat spicy food. I just teased you a bit because you said it doesn't matter!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 상관없어. This sounds very cool and easygoing.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 어떤 선택이든 나에게는 영향을 주지 않는다는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Right. It means that whatever choice is made. it doesn't affect me.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 상대방의 의견을 존중하거나 정말로 다 괜찮을 때 쓰는 표현이에요.
content.translation: It's an expression used when you respect the other person's opinion or when everything is really fine.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 상관없어.
content.translation: It doesn't matter.

content.speaker: John
content.text: And what about 아무거나 좋아.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 주로 메뉴나 물건을 고를 때 많이 써요.
content.translation: This is mainly used when choosing menus or items.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 특별히 싫은 게 없으니 네가 고르는 거라면 뭐든 좋다는 긍정적인 느낌을 주죠.
content.translation: Since there's nothing I particularly dislike. it gives a positive feeling that whatever you choose is good.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아무거나 좋아.
content.translation: Anything is fine.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine we are at a movie theater and we can't decide what to watch.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 지금 바로 볼 수 있는 게 액션 영화랑 코미디 영화가 있는데. 어떤 거 볼래요?
content.translation: John. there's an action movie and a comedy movie we can watch right now. Which one do you want to see?

content.speaker: John
content.text: I like both genres. 상관없어요. 미나가 보고 싶은 걸로 골라요.
content.translation: I like both genres. It doesn't matter. Choose the one you want to watch. Mina.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 음. 그럼 우리 오랜만에 코미디 영화 볼까요? 신나게 웃고 싶거든요.
content.translation: Hmm. Then shall we watch a comedy movie for the first time in a while? I want to have a good laugh.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 괜찮아요. 저도 요즘 스트레스가 많아서 웃고 싶었거든요.
content.translation: It's okay. I've been stressed lately too. so I wanted to laugh.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 좋아요! 그럼 팝콘이랑 콜라는 어떤 걸로 할까요?
content.translation: Great! Then what about popcorn and cola?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그것도 미나 마음대로 해요. 난 미나의 안목을 믿거든요!
content.translation: That too. do as you wish. I trust your taste. Mina!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sometimes "whatever" is the most helpful answer when you're flexible.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 하지만 너무 자주 쓰면 상대방이 결정하는 데 부담을 느낄 수도 있어요.
content.translation: Right. But if you use it too often. the other person might feel pressured to make the decision.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가끔은 내가 원하는 걸 확실히 말하는 것도 중요하다는 점 잊지 마세요!
content.translation: Don't forget that it's also important to say clearly what you want sometimes!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "easygoing" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 괜찮아! It's okay!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 상관없어! It doesn't matter!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 아무거나 좋아! Anything is fine!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 맘대로 해! Do as you wish!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 다 좋아! Everything is good!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 친구와 함께할 때 배려하는 마음을 담아 대답해 보세요. 아무거나 좋아!
content.translation: Everyone. when you are with a friend today. try answering with a caring heart. Anything is fine!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 저는 메뉴가 무엇이든 상관없어요. (I don't care what the menu is.)
배가 너무 고파서 아무거나 잘 먹을 수 있어요. (I'm so hungry that I can eat anything.)
오늘 안으로 결정을 내려야 해요. (I have to make a decision by today.)
너무 부담 갖지 말고 편하게 골라보세요. (Don't feel too pressured and pick comfortably.)
미나는 옷을 고르는 안목이 뛰어나요. (Mina has an excellent eye for picking clothes.)
존은 성격이 유연해서 같이 일하기 편해요. (John has a flexible personality. so it's easy to work with him.)
